Properties.OptionKey: Device Loses Sight Of A PlayerTransmit Every X Triggers

OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Device Loses Sight Of A Player Transmit Every X Triggers
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Device Loses Sight Of A Player Transmit Every X Triggers

OptionDescription.SourceString: Sets the device to only send "Device Loses Sight Of A Player" after being triggered the specified number of times.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Sets the device to only send "Device Loses Sight Of A Player" after being triggered the specified number of times.
